prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: The field condition for E-403 VFDs & motor controls is compared with the referenced drawing or manufacturer sheet. Tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with the installed work, and the revision block shown is current. Source anchors for review: NEC 430, mfr manuals.
title: T1 E-403 Compliant Document interpretation
